cascade_issues.title: Power generation reduced
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially violating the peak power requirement during imaging mode.

cascade_issues.title: Structural balance altered
cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel may alter the structural balance and center of mass, potentially affecting mechanical stability during launch.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal balance disrupted
cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel may disrupt thermal balance, affecting temperature control and stability across orbital cycles.

missing_tests.activity: Shock test to validate structural integrity after solar panel removal
missing_tests.reason: The change may affect the shock response of the payload.

missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to assess thermal stability post-change
missing_tests.reason: Removing a solar panel can impact thermal control and stability.
